message:
chore(deps): bump raptorq 2.0.0 → 2.0.1

Patch bump of the RaptorQ fountain-code encoder used by fp-conformance
for erasure-coded packet envelopes. Cargo.lock already at 2.0.1
transitively — only the crate manifest floor moves.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-conformance --lib` → 334 passed,
  18 failed (18 failures are PRE-EXISTING on `main` prior to this
  bump; verified by re-running baseline with the raptorq change
  reverted via stash — identical 334/18 split. Failures are in
  conformance-gate / packet-filter / CI-pipeline tests that depend
  on env-sensitive sidecar artifacts, not on raptorq surface.)
- `raptorq::{Encoder, Decoder, ObjectTransmissionInformation, ObjectParams}`
  are the public types used by fp-conformance; unchanged between
  2.0.0 and 2.0.1 (patch-level bugfix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
